title: Runtime Configuration
description: Optional runtime config. Every field has a hardcoded default; a missing file or absent section falls back to defaults. Location: {configDir}/runtime-config.json.

$schema.description: Path to this schema for editor tooling.

_meta.description: Audit metadata. Updated by the admin UI on write.

version.description: Schema version. Must equal 1; a non-1 file is rejected and defaults are used.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last write.

updatedBy.description: Principal that last wrote the config.

resilience.description: Client network resilience (circuit breaker, retry, adaptive throttle).

circuitThreshold.description: Consecutive failures before the circuit opens. Default 5.

circuitCooldownMs.description: How long the circuit stays open before half-open probe (ms). Default 60000.

retryJitterMaxMs.description: Max random jitter added to each retry (ms). Default 500.

maxRetryAfterMs.description: Cap honored from a server Retry-After header (ms). Default 30000.

throttleWindowSize.description: Rolling window of recent requests for adaptive throttle. Default 20.

throttleBaselineCount.description: Baseline request count used to compute throttle factors. Default 10.

throttleEnterFactor.description: Load factor at which throttling engages. Must exceed throttleExitFactor. Default 2.0.

throttleExitFactor.description: Load factor at which throttling disengages. Must be < throttleEnterFactor. Default 1.5.

throttleDelayMs.description: Delay injected per request while throttled (ms). Default 2000.

cleanupCutoffMs.description: Idle age after which a limiter bucket is evicted (ms). Default 120000.

anonymousMaxSizeBytes.description: Max bytes stored per anonymous session. Default 10485760 (10 MB).

flightRecorder.description: Flight recorder dump throttling and retention.

maxRetainedDumps.description: Max dump pairs retained on disk. Default 20.

defaultOperationTimeoutMs.description: Default operation timeout (ms, max 1h). Default 120000 (2 min).

longOperationTimeoutMs.description: Long operation timeout (ms, max 1h). Default 600000 (10 min).

subprocessBufferLimitBytes.description: Max subprocess stdout buffer (bytes). Default 10485760 (10 MB).

apiKeyMaskLength.description: Visible characters when masking an API key in logs/UI. Default 4.
